creator: ben@FreeBSD.org
text:
Udo Erdelhoff wrote: > On Thu, Jul 20, 2000 at 04:54:56PM +0100, Ben Smithurst wrote: >> 
>>     pn=\@
>>
> The html-tag pre indicates preformatted text and both Netscape 4 and the > Preview 1 of Netscape 6 (I admit my sin: Yes, I'm using Windows 98, too) > indent this text. Yes. That's what I see too. >> That results from pn=\@, and I'd assume >> conversions to other formats get this right too. > > My eyes tell me a rather different story :-) About what? without the leading white space produces an indent, are you saying the other formats get this wrong? -- Ben Smithurst / ben@FreeBSD.org / PGP: 0x99392F7D FreeBSD Documentation Project /
